body: NPR: Big firms' quarterly results may signal what's next for the economy. July 21, 2025. Mike Dickson, Ph.D. Summary. Mike Dickson, Head of Research and
This week there will be quarterly earnings reports from big companies: Coca-Cola; GM; Lockheed Martin; Alaska, American and Southwest Airlines;
Several companies slated to report their quarterly results next week have regularly posted higher-than-expected revenue and earnings.
